questions.question: What is the maximum level of autonomous decision-making achievable by AI systems without human ethical oversight before unacceptable risk thresholds are crossed?
questions.why_it_matters: Determining this threshold informs governance and deployment policies, balancing innovation with safety.

questions.question: To what extent can global internet infrastructure be decentralized within the next decade to prevent large-scale outages and censorship?
questions.why_it_matters: Decentralization impacts resilience, information freedom, and geopolitical control over digital communication.

questions.question: Will multipolar geopolitical tensions escalate into systemic global conflict within the next 20 years, or will new diplomatic frameworks prevent it?
questions.why_it_matters: Understanding this risk influences defense strategy, international cooperation efforts, and economic planning.

questions.question: Can large-scale direct democratic governance models enabled by digital platforms maintain social cohesion and prevent authoritarian backsliding within 15 years?
questions.why_it_matters: Answers affect the future of political systems and citizen engagement worldwide.

questions.question: Will automation-driven displacement cause net permanent global unemployment above 15% within 20 years, or will new job sectors emerge to absorb displaced workers?
questions.why_it_matters: This determination guides economic policy, social safety nets, and education priorities.

questions.question: Can we develop effective, broadly deployable anti-aging therapies that significantly increase human healthspan within the next 25 years?
questions.why_it_matters: Such therapies would reshape demographics, healthcare systems, and societal structures.

questions.question: Is it feasible for renewable energy sources to provide at least 75% of global energy consumption by 2040 without causing major supply instability?
questions.why_it_matters: Determines viability of climate mitigation strategies and energy security planning.

questions.question: Will AI-generated content surpass 50% of global media consumption within the next 10 years, and how will this shift influence cultural diversity and disinformation risks?
questions.why_it_matters: Impacts media economics, cultural preservation, and information integrity.
